Localization.Description: Power management of a virtual machine guest OS

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} restarted the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} put into the standby mode the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" crashed on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} shut down the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The launch of the unsupported OS {object.value} on virtual machine "{datafield5}" is detected on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Unable to put into the standby mode the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Unable to restart the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Unable to shut down the guest OS of virtual machine "{datafield5}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
